ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded on that date */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded on that date */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded on that date */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature recorded */,
  "mean_dew_point" REAL /* Mean dew point temperature recorded */,
  "min_dew_point" REAL /* Minimum dew point temperature recorded */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure recorded */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure recorded */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure recorded */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility in kilometers */,
  "mean_visibility" REAL /* Mean visibility in kilometers */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility in kilometers */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed recorded */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed recorded */,
  "max_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events recorded (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure measured at the location */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV radiation index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Depth of snow, if applicable */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_events FOREIGN KEY ("events") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is installed */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the weather station */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the weather station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the temperature was recorded (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_readings" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity reading */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity recorded */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity recorded */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity recorded */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the humidity was recorded (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)
